allow: Bash(node -e "const o=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('.claude/settings.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('VALID JSON'\); console.log\('defaultMode =', JSON.stringify\(o.permissions.defaultMode\)\); console.log\('allow entries:', o.permissions.allow.length\);")

PowerShell($root = "d:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\scripts"; $tmp = "$root\\hidden-extract"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; Expand-Archive -Path "$root\\debug-hidden.docx" -DestinationPath $tmp; Get-Content "$tmp\\word\\document.xml" -Raw | Select-Object -First 3000)

PowerShell($root = "d:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\scripts"; Copy-Item "$root\\debug-visible.docx" "$root\\debug-visible.zip" -Force; $tmp = "$root\\visible-extract"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; Expand-Archive -Path "$root\\debug-visible.zip" -DestinationPath $tmp; "Visible doc XML length:"; \(Get-Content "$tmp\\word\\document.xml" -Raw\).Length)

PowerShell($root = "d:\\AI Projects\\assemble.ai P2\\assemble.ai\\scripts"; foreach \($v in @\("hidden","visible"\)\) { Copy-Item "$root\\debug-$v.docx" "$root\\debug-$v.zip" -Force; $tmp = "$root\\$v-extract"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; Expand-Archive -Path "$root\\debug-$v.zip" -DestinationPath $tmp }; "Extracted both.")
